name: octane-app-ssr-workerd-fixture
description: ssr-workerd bench fixture: the streaming-ssr page deployed the way a real Octane app reaches Cloudflare — @octanejs/vite-plugin + @octanejs/adapter-cloudflare producing dist/server/worker.js. Octane-only target; its delta vs the raw octane worker is the metaframework layer's workerd overhead.
